tickets.title: Implement Queue Worker for Scheduled Posts
tickets.description: Create Bull/BullMQ worker to process scheduled posts from database queue. This is a critical blocker preventing actual post publishing.
acceptance_criteria: BullMQ worker connects to Redis and processes queue_jobs table
Worker picks up posts due for publishing based on scheduled_for timestamp
Failed jobs retry up to 3 times with exponential backoff (1min, 5min, 15min)
Job status updates reflected in scheduled_posts.status field
Queue job logs recorded in queue_job_logs table for debugging
files_to_modify: pages/api/scheduler/schedule.ts (persist to database instead of console.log)
missing_info: BullMQ worker deployment strategy (separate process or API route)
definition_of_done: Code is implemented and committed to branch specified in ticket (or main/dev if not specified)
Unit tests added and passing locally
Integration tests or smoke test added (if applicable)
PR created with description, linked to this ticket
Peer review completed and approvals recorded
Deployed to staging environment and QA verified
Documentation and runbook updated if behavior or infra changed
Production monitoring/alerts configured (if applicable)
tickets.dependency_inference_notes: No dependencies - foundational queue infrastructure. Blocks: Cron Job (TCK-003 uses queue), Retry Logic (TCK-010 uses queue), Priority Scheduling (TCK-014 uses queue).

tickets.title: Production OAuth & Posting Integration for All Platforms
tickets.description: Replace mocked posting with real API integrations for LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram, Facebook, and YouTube. Handle OAuth flows, token refresh, and actual posting.
acceptance_criteria: Real OAuth flow completes successfully for all 5 platforms
Access tokens stored securely in social_accounts table (encrypted)
Actual posts published to platforms via their APIs (not mocked)
Refresh tokens automatically renewed before expiration
API errors handled gracefully with user-friendly messages
missing_info: Platform developer app credentials (LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube)
OAuth app redirect URLs for each platform

tickets.title: Cron Job for Processing Scheduled Posts
tickets.description: Create background cron job that checks scheduled_posts table every minute and triggers publishing workflow for due posts.
acceptance_criteria: Cron job runs every 60 seconds checking for posts where scheduled_for <= NOW()
Due posts are added to queue_jobs table with status 'pending'
Cron job handles errors gracefully without crashing
Job processing time logged for monitoring
No duplicate jobs created for same post
missing_info: Cron job deployment method (Vercel Cron, separate worker, or API route with external trigger)

tickets.title: Encrypt OAuth Tokens at Rest
tickets.description: Implement encryption for social account access tokens stored in database to prevent unauthorized access if database is compromised.

Refresh tokens encrypted before storing in social_accounts.refresh_token column
Tokens decrypted automatically when retrieved for API calls
Encryption key stored securely (environment variable or secret manager)
